mapper.select: select count(*) as TOTAL, count(case when status = 'PENDING' then 1 end) as PENDING, count(case when status = 'APPROVED' then 1 end) as APPROVED, count(case when status = 'REJECTED' then 1 end) as REJECTED from overtime_request
select attendance_seq, end_dt, request_min from overtime_request where overtime_seq = #{overtime_seq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO OVERTIME_REQUEST ( OVERTIME_SEQ, ATTENDANCE_SEQ, USERS_ID, WORK_DATE, START_DT, END_DT, REQUEST_MIN, REASON, STATUS ) VALUES ( OVERTIME_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{attendance_seq}, #{users_id}, TO_DATE(#{work_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{start_dt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TO_DATE(#{end_dt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #{request_min}, #{reason}, 'PENDING' )
